UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user slot tracking name, phone number, and allocated API copywriting credits.

id.description: The unique user ID identifier starting with USR-.

name.description: Full name of the affiliate member.

credits.description: Remaining count of AI script generations.

TopUpTransaction.title: TopUpTransaction
TopUpTransaction.description: Ledger entry tracking credit topups and payment verification statuses.

id.description: Unique transaction key starting with TX-.

userId.description: Reference identifier of the purchasing user profile.

packageName.description: Name and description of selected credit package.

amount.description: Represents the dynamic cost in IDR.

creditsGained.description: Count of credits granted upon approval.

ScrapedTrendsCache.title: ScrapedTrendsCache
ScrapedTrendsCache.description: Represents cached product items retrieved via real-time search grounding crawl to optimize quota.

ts.description: Unix timestamp indicating when the crawl occurred.

/users/{userId}.description: Storage path for affiliate member user profiles.

/transactions/{transactionId}.description: Storage path for credit top-up requests and approvals.

/scraped_trends/{nicheId}.description: Cache database partition minimizing API grounding limits and latency.
